top_signals.title: Index-linked Treasury Stock
top_signals.summary: Index-linked treasury stocks are gilts issued by the UK Government. They pay out twice a year, with the amount indexed to the Retail Prices Index.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: EU set to remove barriers to banks’ cross-border capital flows
top_signals.summary: Draft report by European Commission aims to boost performance of lenders in bloc compared with US rivals
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Opening speech by Commissioner Hansen at the DG AGRI and the European Investment Bank (EIB) event 'Boosting generational renewal in EU agriculture – improving access to finance for young farmers'
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Warsaw, 18 Jun 2026  
 

Minister Krajewski, 



Vice-President Vigliotti, 


Representatives of the European Investment Bank, 


Dear young farmers, bankers, policymakers and all ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why Lunar Helium-3 Mining Still Can't Compete With Earth
top_signals.summary: When it comes to Helium-3, the biggest cost divide is between Earth and the Moon. Potential sources range from tritium decay and terrestrial helium wells on Earth to lunar regolith on the Moon. Today, Earth-based sources remain far easier and cheaper to access. This graphic, created by Visual Capitalist's Cody Good in partnership with Pulsar Helium, compares major potential sources of Helium-3 by cost, scalability, and accessibility. It’s part three of four in the Helium 3: From Theory to Opportunity series, delivering key He-3 insights for…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
